programmes.show_description: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.
Abduction: Cult '70s police series. When Regan's ex-wife goes to pick up their daughter from school, she discovers that the girl has been kidnapped and Regan must get her back.

A selection of goals from some of the superstars of the game - including Kevin Keegan and Paul Gascoigne - who played in the old First Division in the 1970s, 1980s and 1990s.
Straight and Narrow: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas is hired by an old acquaintance to find a missing vice girl, he trawls through her list of clients to find clues.
Kojak's Days - Part One: Classic US detective drama. Theo tries to enjoy a day off, but he then gets dragged into dealing with a body found in a stolen car and a scheming woman.
Life in the Fast Food Lane: Comedy-drama series. Arthur gets into the car phone business with a dodgy supplier, and Terry fancies a girl who tries to hide her rich family background.
Magazine show to complement coverage of ITV horse racing - it is presented on-site from the main course each Saturday with additional weekday programmes during the big festivals.
All the racing, glamour and fun of Derby Day at Epsom Downs, including performances from Shergar and Sea The Stars and interviews with sports and entertainment personalities.
Russian Killer: Extreme fisherman Jeremy heads to Russia's remote Amur river to investigate the mysterious deaths of three men and their links to a reclusive freshwater giant.
Abduction: When Regan's ex-wife goes to pick up their daughter from school, she discovers that the girl has been kidnapped - and it's up to Regan to get her back.
A Hypershocking Encounter: US robot combat series. BattleBots veteran Donald Hutson tries to use his decades of experience to beat a resurgent Will Bales and Team HyperShock.
AAPI: Classic US action drama series. Famous French detective Jean-Claude Fornier is murdered while he is presenting Thomas with a prestigious private investigator award.
Kojak's Days - Part Two: The body discovered in the stolen Rolls Royce is identified as Theo tries to track down the woman who killed her husband in time.
When Harry Met Janice: Classic drama. Harry gets more than he bargained for when he meets an attractive woman with lingerie on her mind.
Chalk and Cheese: When a wealthy couple are robbed of their possessions while driving, Carter gets to meet up with an old friend - but not in the circumstances he would have wished.
Aunt Bessie's and Navigator Clocks: Discover how the nation's favourite Yorkshire puddings are made and the British clockmaker paying tribute to a man that changed history.
The Spog Shed: Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald make their first trip to South Australia to visit a demolition expert who salvages material.

Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Mr T, 1982. When Rocky Balboa becomes lazy and complacent, he must rediscover his old self in order to regain his title.

Action from the top flight of French football, including PSG v Toulouse, Strasbourg v Nice, Brest v Rennes, Lille v Lens, Metz v Nantes, Monaco v Marseille and Angers v Lyon.
Tom: Thrilling spy drama. Weir's team has been infiltrated, and he is pulling out all the stops to locate the security breach and identify a mole in the process.
Fusion Confusion: US cooking competition. The chefs go head-to-head in a football-themed cuisine challenge and try not to fall flat for legendary fusion chef and judge Tony Messina.
Around the Corner: Comedy-drama series. Arthur's luck seems to be going to the dogs when he buys a dodgy greyhound and gets conned over some bent videos.

A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s - from football to wrestling and double decker bus racing to boxing - that includes many iconic moments.
AAPI: Classic US action drama series. Famous French detective Jean-Claude Fornier is murdered while he is presenting Thomas with a prestigious private investigator award.
Kojak's Days - Part Two: The body discovered in the stolen Rolls Royce is identified as Theo tries to track down the woman who killed her husband in time.
Return of the Invincible Man: Comedy-drama series. Arthur hires failed safecracker Scotch Harry for a job - and finds himself with a bandaged fugitive on his hands.
Magazine show to complement coverage of ITV horse racing - it is presented on-site from the main course each Saturday with additional weekday programmes during the big festivals.
When Harry Met Janice: Classic drama. Harry gets more than he bargained for when he meets an attractive woman with lingerie on her mind.
Chalk and Cheese: When a wealthy couple are robbed of their possessions while driving, Carter gets to meet up with an old friend - but not in the circumstances he would have wished.
Edges, Wedges, and Wheels: A fresh group of bots look to leave their mark with a signature victory, while Blip takes on Overhaul in an exciting Main Event.
Death and Taxes: Higgins jets off to Maui and leaves Thomas with income tax returns to work on, but a psycho killer disturbs the PI's concentration.
Monkey on a String: Classic US detective drama. A down-on-his-luck cop with a gambling problem ends up owing money to a gangster who offers to clear the debt if he kills Crocker.
Stamp Duty: Classic drama. There is a puzzle for Ken and Harry to solve when a simple case of tracking down a witness turns into a tale of double-crossing and missing money.
Faces: Police series. When a gang hijack an armoured security truck, Regan, Carter and the Flying Squad set up an ambush to catch the crooks. But who's the informer?
Arthur Is Dead, Long Live Arthur: Comedy-drama series. Arthur considers taking his own life when faced with a massive tax demand.
Furphy Man: The first episode of the Australian American Pickers spin-off. Salvage experts Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald visit a collector who specialises in Furphy water carts.
Trapped on Thin Ice: Nail-biting documentary series. Jack Jessee traverses steep mountain passes during an urgent fuel delivery and fears that he may get stranded on a frozen river.
